title: Build staged optimization runner and assessment-bundle recording workflow
description:
## Summary
Build the workflow runner/orchestrator that executes the staged optimization protocol and records the resulting assessment bundle.

## Deliverables
- Execute deterministic and random evaluation stages in the defined order.
- Capture the evaluation IDs involved in one candidate assessment bundle.
- Record the combined result and workflow decision in a standardized way for operators and future agents.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runner contract lock-in: emit exactly one candidate assessment bundle per baseline/candidate comparison; bundle must reference stage evaluation IDs as source-of-truth; final decision must be reproducible from persisted bundle + referenced evaluation records.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Unblocked and moved in_progress after bundle contract completion (plx-076ad2). Next implementation slice: wire runner orchestration to emit one bundle per baseline/candidate comparison and persist attachment + compact summary pointers.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented staged workflow orchestration helper in shared CLI: run_candidate_assessment_workflow() now executes deterministic -> random_iteration -> random_gate in locked order, computes decision via assess_candidate(), emits one canonical bundle, builds compact summary, and supports strict attachment persistence interface (no fallback path). Added tests for stage order, persistence behavior, and persist-without-task-id failure. Validation: pytest -q plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_bundle_test.py plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_runner_test.py plexus/cli/shared/evaluation_value_function_test.py plexus/cli/shared/optimization_acceptance_policy_test.py (15 passed).
